ideation: This animation sequence simulates the action of a woman gracefully placing a hat on her head.  The movement will be elegant and deliberate, focusing on a smooth transition from arms at the sides to the hat being placed on the head.  Since the robot has no hands, the gesture will be implied through arm positions.  The left arm will simulate holding the hat, moving it upward, while the right arm remains slightly raised in anticipation. Frame 1 will start with both arms at the sides. Frame 2 will show the left arm beginning its upward movement, while the right arm remains steady. Frame 3 will depict the left arm almost at the head, as if positioning the hat. Frame 4 shows both arms returning to their resting positions. Frame 5 shows both arms at rest.

frames.beat: arms hang at sides, ready to adorn
left arm lifts as if holding a hat
left arm moves higher, positioning the hat gently
hat is placed, arms return to sides
both arms rest, the hat is settled
